scripts.build: npm install && cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx tsc
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma db push && node dist/app.js
scripts.railway:build: npm install && cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx tsc
scripts.railway:start: cd server && npx prisma db push && node dist/app.js
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=server && npm run test:coverage --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=client
